# Luis - Knowledge Base

> Personal NestJS-focused knowledge base. Concept notes, recipes, patterns, and gotchas. Deployed at https://losiochico.github.io/knowledge-base. Source: https://github.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base.

This file follows the https://llmstxt.org spec. Use it as the entrypoint for ingesting the whole vault. Each link points to a markdown source file in the repo. The agent contract is in `AGENTS.md` at the repo root and MUST be read before any edit.

## Operating contract

- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/AGENTS.md): folder layout, frontmatter schema, controlled tag vocabulary, mandatory pre-flight ritual, and linking rules

## Maps of content

- [Knowledge Base home](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/index.md): top-level areas list
- [NestJS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/index.md): all NestJS notes grouped by fundamentals, recipes, and planned areas
- [NestJS recipes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/recipes/index.md): how-to guides

## NestJS fundamentals

- [Request lifecycle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/fundamentals/request-lifecycle.md): the order in which middleware, guards, interceptors, pipes, controllers, and exception filters run
- [Middleware](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/fundamentals/middleware.md): Express/Fastify-level interception, runs before guards
- [Guards](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/fundamentals/guards.md): authorization decisions, return boolean, run after middleware
- [Interceptors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/fundamentals/interceptors.md): wrap the handler with before/after logic, RxJS-based
- [Pipes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/fundamentals/pipes.md): transform and validate inputs before they reach the handler
- [Exception filters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/fundamentals/exception-filters.md): catch thrown errors and shape the response

## NestJS recipes

- [File uploads with Multer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/recipes/file-uploads.md): accept multipart/form-data, validate size and mime-type, memory vs disk storage, gotchas
- [Response serialization with class-transformer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/recipes/serialization.md): ClassSerializerInterceptor, @Exclude/@Expose/@Transform, role-based groups, the class-instance gotcha
- [Request validation with class-validator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOsioChico/knowledge-base/main/content/nestjs/recipes/validation.md): ValidationPipe, whitelist/forbidNonWhitelisted, transform + implicit conversion, validation groups, nested objects, custom validators

## Optional

Reserved areas, not yet authored. When added, move them above and update `AGENTS.md` tag vocabulary.

- microservices (Kafka, RabbitMQ, NATS, CQRS, domain events, outbox)
- data (Prisma, TypeORM, transactions, migrations)
- auth (JWT, sessions, Passport strategies, OAuth)
- testing (unit, e2e, mocking, fixtures)
- observability (OpenTelemetry, structured logging, tracing)
- deployment (Docker, GitHub Actions, env config)
